page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web based bioinformatics platform for the management, storage, and development of metabolic models. It supports the development of new models by providing a built in version control system which offers access to the complete reconstruction history.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web based bioinformatics platform for the management, storage, and development of metabolic models. It supports the development of new models by providing a built in version control system which offers access to the complete reconstruction history.
